title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Momonosuke, Unknown person #1, Kinemon, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Don't, Momo- Nosuke!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It hasn't been tasted for poison yet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're also preparing themselves...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: mother,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why is my life being targeted?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Munch munch

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because your father is a grand person... and you,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: are the man who will someday carry the burden of this country.

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Here you go, MOMONO- Suke-SAMA...Hiyori- SAMA.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: mother

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Today... Father...! is he truly going to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Drip Drip

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Big bro?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will now proceed with the public execution...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: of Kozuki often and his 9 retainers!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quick! It's very rare to see someone getting boiled!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: they throw them in oil! It will be over in an instant!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: All the more reason to hurry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Even the "idiot Lord" couldn't do it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I thought he was really strong.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Who was he even?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want a chance to get through this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I must live no matter what.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Eh!! Get in!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: begging for your life like this, you're a funny guy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Zish!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Evaluation on April 11,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WAHA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Gysphapaca playanph!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Heeelp mee!! Heeled!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Get away! Don't get close to us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: However, I'll

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hurrikkkk

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 34 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
